initial_prompt: In the project at {workdir}, this python version_conflict fails: pip dependency resolution conflict — cannot resolve automatically; report conflict details to user. Reproduce the failure with `python3 -m pip install --dry-run --user --no-index --no-build-isolation --no-cache-dir --break-system-packages -r requirements.txt`, diagnose the root cause by reading the project files, and apply a fix so that same command exits 0.
